overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 transitioning from night-time driving through a neon-lit futuristic city to daytime walking along a sunlit waterfront promenade. The clip showcases high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and dense urban architecture before cutting to a serene palm-lined waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit multi-lane urban thoroughfare with elevated highways

events.description: pedestrian in green beanie passes close to camera, temporarily blocking view
camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers against night sky
hard cut from night city to bright daylight waterfront scene

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate traffic on multi-lane city street, occasionally glancing at neon signage

multiple cars driving in same direction through traffic

entered.detail: large concrete overpass with orange lighting running parallel to street

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense cyberpunk city at night, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and vibrant neon billboards. An elevated highway structure runs along the left side while traffic flows through the multi-lane street. The camera briefly tilts up to showcase the massive scale of the futuristic architecture before transitioning away.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit waterfront promenade with palm trees

events.description: abrupt shift from artificial neon lighting to bright natural sunlight with lens flare
camera approaches and passes person sitting on concrete steps by the water

agents.ego_description: strolling along waterfront promenade, observing the water and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete steps near yellow handrails, looking at the water
couple walking along the promenade in same direction as camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the waterfront walkway
calm body of water reflecting bright sunlight
ruined concrete pillars extending into the water
modern multi-story buildings with balconies facing the water
distinctive curved building with yellow and green trim along the waterfront

segments.scene_description: A bright, sunlit waterfront scene with palm trees lining a concrete promenade. The camera walks past modern buildings and a person sitting on steps near yellow handrails, with calm ocean water reflecting the sun on the left. The atmosphere shifts dramatically from the previous neon-lit urban environment to a serene, warm coastal setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dense, neon-lit futuristic metropolis at night to a serene, sun-drenched coastal promenade. It begins by gliding through a multi-lane street surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and vibrant billboards, with an elevated highway structure framing the left side. As the camera briefly tilts upward to capture the massive scale of the urban architecture, the environment shifts dramatically from the dark, electric city to a bright, open waterfront. The scene then expands into a warm coastal setting, moving past palm trees and modern buildings along a concrete promenade where a person sits near yellow handrails. Finally, the camera continues its path beside calm ocean water that reflects the brilliant sunlight, completing the transformation into a peaceful daytime atmosphere.
